testcase.name: contextLoads

--- RUNNING EMPLOYEE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM DEMO (EXERCISES 1-10) --- Hibernate: insert into departments (created_by, created_date, last_modified_by, last_modified_date, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into departments (created_by, created_date, last_modified_by, last_modified_date, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Saved Departments: HR, IT Hibernate: insert into employees (created_by, created_date, department_id, email, last_modified_by, last_modified_date, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into employees (created_by, created_date, department_id, email, last_modified_by, last_modified_date, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into employees (created_by, created_date, department_id, email, last_modified_by, last_modified_date, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Saved Employees: Alice, Bob, Charlie
============ Exercise 7: Auditing Verification ============ Employee 'Alice' Audit Info: Created By: system_admin Created Date: 2026-07-04T13:59:19.805778800 Last Modified By: system_admin Last Modified Date: 2026-07-04T13:59:19.805778800
============ Exercise 5: Custom Query Methods ============ Derived Query: findByNameContaining('Brown'): Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from employees e1_0 where e1_0.name like ? escape '\' Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Employee [id=3, name=Charlie Brown, email=charlie@company.com] JPQL Query: findByDepartmentName('Information Technology'): Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from employees e1_0 join departments d1_0 on d1_0.id=e1_0.department_id where d1_0.name=? Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Employee [id=1, name=Alice Johnson, email=alice@company.com] Employee [id=3, name=Charlie Brown, email=charlie@company.com] Named Query: findByNameNamedQuery('Bob Smith'): Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from employees e1_0 where e1_0.name=? Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Employee [id=2, name=Bob Smith, email=bob@company.com] Native Query: findByEmailNative('alice@company.com'): Hibernate: SELECT * FROM employees WHERE email = ? Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Employee [id=1, name=Alice Johnson, email=alice@company.com]
============ Exercise 6: Pagination and Sorting ============ Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from employees e1_0 order by e1_0.name desc offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Hibernate: select count(e1_0.id) from employees e1_0 Page 0 details (size 2, sorted by Name DESC): Total Elements: 3 Total Pages: 2 Content in current page: - Charlie Brown (charlie@company.com) - Bob Smith (bob@company.com)
============ Exercise 8: Interface and Class Projections ============ Interface-based Projection (Employees in IT department): Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from employees e1_0 left join departments d1_0 on d1_0.id=e1_0.department_id where d1_0.id=? Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name from departments d1_0 where d1_0.id=? Name: Alice Johnson | Email: alice@company.com SpEL Projection (FullNameAndEmail): Alice Johnson (alice@company.com) Name: Charlie Brown | Email: charlie@company.com SpEL Projection (FullNameAndEmail): Charlie Brown (charlie@company.com) Class-based Projection (EmployeeDTO for ID 1): Hibernate: select e1_0.name, e1_0.email from employees e1_0 where e1_0.id=? DTO Name: Alice Johnson | DTO Email: alice@company.com
============ Exercise 10: Hibernate Bulk Batch Processing ============ Triggering batch insert of 30 employees... Hibernate: select d1_0.id, d1_0.created_by, d1_0.created_date, d1_0.last_modified_by, d1_0.last_modified_date, d1_0.name, e1_0.department_id, e1_0.id, e1_0.created_by, e1_0.created_date, e1_0.email, e1_0.last_modified_by, e1_0.last_modified_date, e1_0.name from departments d1_0 left join employees e1_0 on d1_0.id=e1_0.department_id where d1_0.id=?
